title: See where your startup fits.
excerpt: Explore public YC companies from 2020 through today and generate a private, data-informed application fit report.
content_html:
AAPPLICATION SIGNALPUBLIC DIRECTORY · 2020—CURRENT
MethodologyAnalyze a plan

Public Y Combinator companies from 2020 to today

Explore the patterns across recent YC companies—then turn your business plan into a private, evidence-led fit report.

0companies

0%AI-linked

—batches

How to read the map

Distance is the signal. Nearby dots represent companies with similar model profiles. X and Y are normalized layout coordinates—not individual business metrics or scores.

X · learned horizontal position →Y · learned vertical position ↓

2020202120222023202420252026Dot = public companyCloser = more similar

How to read this

Each dot is a company. Every score is a comparison—not a verdict.

Industry, batch, location, and descriptions come from public YC directory records. Target market and AI linkage are transparent rule-based inferences used to make the map easier to explore.

The public directory covers companies from 2020 through the current year. The active fit model remains separately versioned, so search updates never silently change an existing score. This is an independent research tool, not an official YC product, acceptance probability, or investment recommendation.

Bring your plan into the map.

Sign in, upload a selectable-text PDF, approve the analysis, and receive a private visual report with practical improvements.

Start an analysis

Contact us

Found an issue?

content_html_zh:
AAPPLICATION SIGNALPUBLIC DIRECTORY · 2020—CURRENT
MethodologyAnalyze a plan

2020 年至今的上市 Y Combinator 公司

探索近期 YC 公司的模式，然后将您的商业计划转变为私人的、以证据为主导的适合报告。

0家公司

0%人工智能相关

——批次

如何阅读地图

距离就是信号。 附近的点代表具有相似型号配置文件的公司。 X 和 Y 是标准化布局坐标，而不是单独的业务指标或分数。

X·学习水平位置 →Y·学习垂直位置 ↓

2020202120222023202420252026点=上市公司更接近=更相似

如何阅读此内容

每个点都是一个公司。 每个分数都是一个比较，而不是一个结论。

行业、批次、位置和描述来自公共 YC 目录记录。 目标市场和人工智能联动是透明的基于规则的推理，用于使地图更容易探索。

公共名录涵盖 2020 年至今的公司。 主动拟合模型保持单独版本控制，因此搜索更新永远不会默默地更改现有分数。 这是一个独立的研究工具，不是YC官方产品、接受概率或投资建议。

将您的计划带入地图。

登录、上传可选择文本的 PDF、批准分析并接收包含实际改进的私人视觉报告。

Start an analysis

联系我们
